input.prompt: Scatter plot of model benchmark scores: x-axis = inference latency (ms), y-axis = MMLU accuracy (%). Plot 8 models: GPT-4o (120ms, 88%), Claude 3.5 Sonnet (95ms, 87%), Gemini 1.5 Pro (110ms, 86%), Llama 3.1 70B (40ms, 79%), Mistral Large (55ms, 81%), Qwen2.5 72B (35ms, 80%), DeepSeek-V2 (45ms, 82%), Command R+ (70ms, 78%). Color-code by provider family.

notes: scatter template with 8 data points across 4 provider families; exercises axis scaling, color-coded series legend, and point labeling without overlap.
